rulings.Case Title: THE BOARDS OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS et al VS. BRYLUEN INTERNATIONAL, LTD. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Index Of Federal Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 20, 2010, line 12. PETITIONERS THE BOARDS OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES, STATIONARY ENGINEERS LOCAL 39 HEALTH AND WELFARE, STATIONARY ENGINEERS LOCAL 39 ANNUITY TRUST FUND'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is off calendar per moving party. =(302/CWW)

Set for hearing on Friday, August 20, 2010, line 13. DEFENDANT KAREN LANGENBERG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 5 days leave to answer. Plaintiff, as co-owner of the building has legal capacity to sue. (See Rutter, Landlord-Tenant Practice Guide section 2.120.) No court order currently awards control of the subject unit to Eastwood. =(302/CWW)
